overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character carrying a lantern while walking through a rural farmstead at night. The character traverses from a fenced path through a wooden corncrib structure and past farm buildings before heading into open fields.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path beside a white wooden fence, carrying a lantern toward a distant farmhouse

entered.detail: white painted wooden fence running parallel to the path on the left side
large wooden farmhouse with lit windows visible in the distance
narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass
tall green grass covering the open field
clusters of white flowers growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path at night, illuminated by the lantern they carry. A white wooden fence runs along the left side while a large farmhouse with glowing windows looms ahead. Tall grass and wildflowers line the path in this open rural setting.

events.description: enters wooden corncrib structure with slatted walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow passage of a wooden corncrib, lantern light illuminating the slatted walls

entered.detail: elevated wooden structure with vertical slats forming a narrow passage
farmhouse visible through the far end of the corncrib structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow wooden corncrib structure, transitioning from the open field to an enclosed passage. The lantern casts shadows through the wooden slats as the character approaches the distant exit where another farmhouse is visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmyard with elevated house and wagon

events.description: exits corncrib into open farmyard with elevated farmhouse

agents.ego_description: walking past farm buildings and a wooden wagon, staying close to an elevated farmhouse on the right

entered.detail: wooden farmhouse raised on stilts with a front porch and stairs
wooden cart with large wheels and crate cargo parked beside the path
wooden barrels and farming equipment under the elevated house

segments.scene_description: Exiting the corncrib, the character enters a farmyard featuring an elevated wooden farmhouse on the right with barrels underneath. A wooden wagon sits parked on the left side of the path as the character continues past the farm structures.

events.description: leaves farm buildings behind entering open grassland

agents.ego_description: walking away from the farmstead into open fields, following the fading dirt path toward distant trees

entered.detail: dark silhouette of trees marking the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the farm buildings behind and heads into expansive open grassland. The path becomes less defined as the character walks toward a distant tree line under the night sky, with only the lantern light illuminating the surrounding tall grass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural farmstead at night, transitioning from an open path into a confined structure before emerging into expansive grasslands. It begins along a dirt path lined with a white wooden fence and wildflowers, moving toward a large farmhouse with glowing windows. As the character progresses, the open air gives way to the narrow confines of a wooden corncrib, where the lantern casts flickering shadows through the slats toward a distant exit. The scene then opens into a farmyard featuring a wooden wagon and an elevated farmhouse with barrels underneath, before the camera follows the character past these buildings. Finally, the environment shifts once more as the path fades into wide, open grassland, leading toward a distant tree line under the dark night sky.
